title: Neruppu Koothadikkuthu Song Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai
stanzas:
ye urakkam enna koothukattu
oththayila koothukattu
hey uzhaichathelaam podhumada
vidiya vidiya koothukattu

innaikku mudinji pochu
eduthu mootta kattu
raathiri irukkuthadaa
roundaa koothukattu .
koothukattey...

thunbam indha thunbam
idhu manitharodu piranthadhu
un kaiyyil regai pola
azhiyaamal kooda varuvadhu

idhai enni sogam endraal
ada naamum endru sirippathu
idhu endrum mudiyaadhu
nam kadaisi moochil kalanthadhu

maram sedi kodiyum kooda
puyalil odanji kedakkuthu
marunadi thunbam marandhu
thala thookki sirikkuthu

innaikku mudinji pochu
eduthu mootta kattu
raathiri irukkuthadaa
roundaa koothukattu .

un kannil eeram kanden
en manathil engo valikkudhu
mugam saaya vizhi mooda
indha naban tholgal irukkudhu

indha vaanam adhu vanthu
unnai punnagaikka kenjuthu
atharkkaaga antha vinnil
adhu vedikkaigal kaatudhu

soththam paththum serthavanu
pogaiyaathaan poguraan
sogathula sirippavanthaan
sugamaaga vazhuraan

ye urakkam enna koothukattu
oththayila koothukattu
hey uzhaichathelaam podhumada
vidiya vidiya koothukattu

innaikku mudinji pochu
eduthu mootta kattu
raathiri irukkuthadaa
roundaa koothukattu .
koothukattey...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Neruppu Koothadikkuthu conveys a sense of joy and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace life and dance.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Thulluvadho Ilamai, this song captures the youthful spirit and carefree attitude of the characters as they celebrate together.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Chithra Sivaraman and Venkat Prabhu, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

Neruppu Koothadikkuthu was released on March 1, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neruppu Koothadikkuthu, the characters of Thulluvadho Ilamai come alive with a vibrant energy that reflects their youthful exuberance. The song is a celebration of life, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This dance number perfectly encapsulates the spirit of friendship and joy, making it a memorable highlight of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neruppu Koothadikkuthu from Thulluvadho Ilamai is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring the captivating voices of Chithra Sivaraman and Venkat Prabhu. With Yuvan's infectious beats and Pa Vijay's lively lyrics, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the joy and excitement that this dynamic collaboration brings to the dance floor!
stanzaMeanings: The fire is dancing, the wind is dancing, the whole town is dancing, come on, come on.
What is this sleep? It’s a dance of joy, a dance of hard work, it’s enough to just enjoy the dance.
Today is over, take it easy, the night is here, let’s dance around. Let’s keep dancing...
The fire is dancing, the wind is dancing, the whole town is dancing, come on, come on.
This sorrow is born with humans, it comes like a burden in your hands without fading away.
If we think of this sorrow, we also smile, this can never end, it’s mixed in our last breath.
Even the trees and the clouds are dancing in the storm, forgetting their sorrows, lifting their heads and smiling.
Hey, rise up, look at the sky, search for good stars, search for the stars.
The fire is dancing, the wind is dancing, the whole town is dancing, come on, come on.
Today is over, take it easy, the night is here, let’s dance around.
I saw tears in your eyes, my heart is somewhere else, hiding behind closed eyes, there are losses in this world.
This sky has come to bless you, for that, the stars in the sky are showing their paths.
The one who combines sound and silence is the one who truly lives happily in sorrow.
In life, what is the blessing? It’s just a matter of fate.
The fire is dancing, the wind is dancing, the whole town is dancing, come on, come on.
What is this sleep? It’s a dance of joy, a dance of hard work, it’s enough to just enjoy the dance.
Today is over, take it easy, the night is here, let’s dance around. Let’s keep dancing...
The fire is dancing, the wind is dancing, the whole town is dancing, come on, come on.
